parsed_output.justification: Paul claims to be the Seer and states he used his ability to look at James, identifying him as the Tanner. However, Paul later claims that Justin is the only possible werewolf because he 'knows what he is,' which is impossible for a Seer who has already used their single look on another player. This contradiction strongly suggests that Paul is lying about his role to divert suspicion, making him the most likely Werewolf.

validation.justification: Paul claims to be the Seer and states he used his ability to look at James, identifying him as the Tanner. However, Paul later claims that Justin is the only possible werewolf because he 'knows what he is,' which is impossible for a Seer who has already used their single look on another player. This contradiction strongly suggests that Paul is lying about his role to divert suspicion, making him the most likely Werewolf.
